title: SKILL.md Spec Compliance — Align vSkill Emitters with agentskills.io/specification
description: Align vSkill's SKILL.md emitters with the canonical spec at https://agentskills.io/specification. Today, `tags` and `target-agents` are written at the top-level of the frontmatter; the spec requires them nested under `metadata:`. Fix the primary emitter in `src/eval-server/skill-create-routes.ts`, update 0670-skill-builder-universal's template files, update test fixtures, integrate `skills-ref validate` into the `vskill skill new` post-creation pipeline (warn-only unless `--strict`), and add a CI npm script `lint:skills-spec`. Golden-file tests lock the new frontmatter shape.
